questions.q: According to a study featured in the news on April 25, 2026, what ongoing problem do many introductory psychology textbooks have?
options: They misrepresent scientific findings and repeat long-standing myths
They are too advanced for college freshmen
They focus exclusively on modern neurobiology
questions.correctText: They misrepresent scientific findings and repeat long-standing myths

questions.q: A study widely reported on April 25, 2026, revealed that feeling which specific emotion makes people more likely to rapidly share misinformation online?
A disturbing environmental study from April 2026 found that what percentage of Marine Protected Areas are polluted by sewage?
A 2026 Norwegian study using machine learning to analyze anti-Muslim hate speech online found that most hateful posts come from:
options: A small group of users who don't remain active for long
Automated foreign bots that post continuously
A widespread number of casual social media users
Verified accounts with large follower bases
questions.correctText: A small group of users who don't remain active for long

questions.q: Based on April 2026 research from Lund University, children exposed to very high PFAS levels in the womb showed a 40% increased risk of which condition?
